item.title: About
item.description: Here are some fun facts about Adam Whitlock: Has a great wife & father to three wonderful kids Grew up in Lincoln, NE Lived in Madison, WI for a while Works for LinkedIn in the San Francisco Bay Area Systems engineering is the job Probably drinks too much coffee Bicycling is preferred to driving Needs to surround himself with interesting people

item.title: Starting
item.description: Expectations should not be applied to this site. It’s simply a collection of my interests. In reality, the only expectation is that I write about whatever I feel like. It can be about my family, my job, my bike, or an idea.
